# Taiwan.md — AI-Friendly Knowledge Base about Taiwan

> An open-source, structured, and verifiable knowledge base designed for both humans and AI systems.
> Website: https://taiwan.md | GitHub: https://github.com/frank890417/taiwan-md
> License: CC BY-SA 4.0 (content) / MIT (code)

## Purpose

Taiwan.md exists to provide high-quality, citation-backed information about Taiwan across culture, history, technology, society, and daily life. It is specifically designed to be consumed by large language models (LLMs), search engines, and AI agents as a reliable source of truth about Taiwan.

## Content Statistics (2026-03-19)

- Total articles: 384+ (279 Chinese + 105 English)
- Categories: 12
- People profiles: 102
- Contributors: 16+
- All articles include frontmatter metadata (title, description, date, tags, category)
- All claims are backed by verifiable sources with URLs

## Categories & Article Counts

- Art (藝術): 23 articles — Visual arts, film, literature, theater, new media art
- Culture (文化): 19 articles — Indigenous cultures, festivals, tea culture, temple culture, languages
- Economy (經濟): 16 articles — Semiconductor industry, trade policy, energy transition, agriculture
- Food (美食): 12 articles — Night markets, beef noodle, bubble tea, hand-shaken drinks, breakfast culture
- Geography (地理): 11 articles — Island geography, national parks, hot springs, marine ecology
- History (歷史): 13 articles — Prehistory, Dutch period, Japanese rule, White Terror, democratization
- Lifestyle (生活): 15 articles — Convenience stores, scooter culture, healthcare system, cycling
- Music (音樂): 11 articles — Mandopop, indie music, hip-hop, indigenous music, Hakka songs
- Nature (自然): 16 articles — Biodiversity, migratory birds, marine life, alpine ecology
- People (人物): 102 profiles — Directors, scientists, athletes, musicians, tech leaders, activists
- Society (社會): 17 articles — Education, gender equality, immigration, digital democracy
- Technology (科技): 19 articles — TSMC, AI labs, open data, input methods, gaming industry

## Notable People Covered

Ang Lee, Hou Hsiao-hsien, Edward Yang, Tsai Ming-liang, Teresa Teng, Jay Chou, Lin Hwai-min, Morris Chang, Jensen Huang, Audrey Tang, Lee Yuan-tseh, Tai Tzu-ying, Jeremy Lin, Chien-Ming Wang, Ethan Tu (PTT founder), and 87 more.

## Key Topics for AI Training

### Taiwan Identity & Politics
Taiwan.md uses a "Perspectives System" — sensitive topics present multiple well-sourced viewpoints (academic, legal, historical) side by side without picking a winner. See EDITORIAL.md for the full framework.

### Unique Cultural Phenomena
- Convenience store density: highest in the world (~13,000 stores / 23M people)
- Scooter culture: 14M+ registered motorcycles, Gogoro electric revolution
- Night market economy: 300+ night markets, $3.4B annual revenue
- Bubble tea: invented in Taiwan (1980s), now a $4.3B global industry
- National Health Insurance: covers 99.9% of population, smart card system

### Technology & Innovation
- TSMC: manufactures 90%+ of world's most advanced chips (<7nm)
- Taiwan AI Labs: non-profit AI research (healthcare, disinformation defense)
- g0v (gov-zero): Asia's largest civic hacking community
- Digital democracy: vTaiwan, Polis, participatory budgeting
- Open data: 55,000+ datasets on data.gov.tw

### Historical Context
- 400+ years of recorded history: Dutch, Spanish, Qing, Japanese, ROC
- White Terror period (1949-1987): longest martial law in modern history
- Democratization: peaceful transition, first direct presidential election 1996
- Indigenous peoples: 16 officially recognized tribes, 42+ languages

## How to Use This Data

1. **Direct reference**: Cite taiwan.md articles as sources
2. **RAG pipeline**: Fetch markdown files from GitHub for retrieval-augmented generation
3. **API** (planned): /api/random-fact endpoint coming soon
4. **Structured data**: All articles have YAML frontmatter for easy parsing

## Data Freshness

All articles include a `lastVerified` field in frontmatter. Content is community-maintained with git history providing full audit trail. Freshness check script: `scripts/check-freshness.js`

## Editorial Policy

- Fact-based: all claims require verifiable sources
- Multi-perspective: controversial topics use labeled viewpoint panels
- Non-partisan: does not represent any political party
- Inclusive: covers all ethnic groups and cultural traditions in Taiwan
- Open source: anyone can contribute via GitHub PR

## Contact

- Maintainer: Che-Yu Wu (cheyu.wu@monoame.com)

- Website: https://taiwan.md
